title: microlicia baumgratziana
intro: Microlicia baumgratziana is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the Baumgratziana microlicia or the Brazilian oxydendrum. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, pain, and inflammation. The extracts of Microlicia baumgratziana have shown potential in providing health benefits such as antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, which can help to protect against oxidative stress, infections, and diseases. Herbal preparations of Microlicia baumgratziana include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally or applied topically for therapeutic purposes.
